vocab.example: We need to organize a team-building event next month.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta cần tổ chức một sự kiện team-building vào tháng sau.

vocab.example: Have you booked a venue for the year-end party?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn đã đặt địa điểm cho tiệc cuối năm chưa?

vocab.example: Please RSVP by Friday so we can plan the catering.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng xác nhận tham dự trước thứ Sáu để chúng tôi chuẩn bị đồ ăn.

vocab.meaning_vi: phục vụ đồ ăn (cho sự kiện)
vocab.example: We hired a company to cater the lunch for the event.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi thuê một công ty phục vụ đồ ăn trưa cho sự kiện.

vocab.example: Can you help decorate the office for the party?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể giúp trang trí văn phòng cho buổi tiệc không?

vocab.example: I've put a sign-up sheet on the board for volunteers.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đã dán danh sách đăng ký lên bảng cho tình nguyện viên.

vocab.example: Who's handling the logistics, like the tables and chairs?
vocab.example_vi: Ai sẽ lo công tác hậu cần, như bàn ghế?

vocab.example: We expect a good turnout for this year's event.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi mong sẽ có nhiều người tham dự sự kiện năm nay.

lines.speaker: Nam (event lead)
lines.text: Linh, can you help me organize the year-end party this year?

lines.speaker: Linh (colleague)
lines.text: Sure! Have we booked a venue yet?

lines.speaker: Nam (event lead)
lines.text: Not yet, but I found a nice place near the office.

lines.speaker: Linh (colleague)
lines.text: Great. Should we send out an RSVP form to everyone?

lines.speaker: Nam (event lead)
lines.text: Yes, please ask everyone to RSVP by next Friday.

lines.speaker: Linh (colleague)
lines.text: I'll also check which company can cater the lunch.

lines.speaker: Nam (event lead)
lines.text: Good idea. We should decorate the venue too.

lines.speaker: Linh (colleague)
lines.text: I'll put a sign-up sheet for volunteers to help decorate.

lines.speaker: Nam (event lead)
lines.text: Thanks. Can you also handle the logistics, like tables and chairs?

lines.speaker: Linh (colleague)
lines.text: Sure. I really hope we get a good turnout this year.

lines.speaker: Nam (event lead)
lines.text: Me too. Let's send the invitation email out today.

lines.speaker: Linh (colleague)
lines.text: Sounds good, I'll draft the invitation right now.

questions.q: What does Nam ask Linh to help with?
What does Nam ask everyone to do by Friday?
What does Linh put up for volunteers?

shadowing: Can you help me organize the year-end party this year?
Please RSVP by Friday so we can plan the catering.
We hired a company to cater the lunch for the whole team.
I've put a sign-up sheet on the board for volunteers.
Who's handling the logistics, like the tables and the chairs?
